zh.Eastchurch, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯丘其

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Cheyne於1530年出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其時，她的父親Sir Thomas Cheney45歲，母親Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke32歲。她於1553年之前與Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1553年9月在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年23歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Cheyne于1530年出生在英国肯特易亞斯丘其时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Cheney45岁，母亲Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke32岁。她于1553年之前与Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1553年9月在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年23岁，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Cheyne was born in 1530, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, her father, Sir Thomas Cheney, was 45 and her mother, Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke, was 32. She married Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot before 1553. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in September 1553, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 23, and was buried in Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Cheyne est née en 1530, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Cheney, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot avant 1553. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en septembre 1553, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Cheyne 1530 in Eastchurch, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Cheney 45 und ihre Mutter Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke 32. Sie hat vor 1553 Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb im September 1553 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Cheyne è nata il nel 1530 nel Eastchurch, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Cheney, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot prima del 1553. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel settembre 1553, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Cheyneが1530年にイギリスケントエアストチャーチで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Cheneyは45歳，母Lady Frideswide Anne Frowickeは32歳であった。1553年以前にLord Sir John Thomas Perrotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1553年9月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで23歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Cheyne(이)가 1530년 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Cheney(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1553년 이전 Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 9월 영국 그루스스터실르에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Eastchurch, Kent, England: Eastchurch, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Cheyne nasceu em 1530, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Cheney, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot antes 1553. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1553, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 23 anos, e foi sepultada em Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Cheyne родилась в 1530 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Cheney было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot перед 1553 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла сентябрь 1553 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Cheyne nació en 1530, en Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Cheney, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot antes de 1553. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en septiembre de 1553, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultada en Pembrokeshire, Gales.
